zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Walcott於大約1394年出生在英國史洛普爾萊德波利 諾斯時，他的父親John Walcot27歲，母親Mrs. John Walcot24歲。他於1416年與Matilda Cornwall在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年在英國史洛普爾李 布洛可爾斯特享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Walcott于大约1394年出生在英国史洛普爾萊德波利 諾斯时，他的父亲John Walcot27岁，母亲Mrs. John Walcot24岁。他于1416年与Matilda Cornwall在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年在英国史洛普爾李 布洛可爾斯特享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Walcott, Walcot, or Walcote, for example in Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Norfolk, Oxfordshire, and Wiltshire, all named in Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala) + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’ (plural cotu), i.e. ‘the cottage where the (Welsh-speaking) Britons lived’. This name is also frequent in Barbados and Jamaica, when emancipated slaves adopted it from the name of one or other of the sugar plantations owned there by English families called Walcott.
History: This surname was in MA from an early date. William Walcott emigrated from England to Salem, MA, in 1637; John Wolcott (1632–1690) is recorded in Springfield, MA.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Walcott was born about 1394, in Lydbury North, Shropshire, England, his father, John Walcot, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. John Walcot, was 24. He married Matilda Cornwall in 1416, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1470, in Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Walcott est né environ 1394, à Lydbury North, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John Walcot, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Walcot, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Cornwall en 1416, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1470, à Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Walcott um 1394 in Lydbury North, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Walcot 27 und seine Mutter Mrs. John Walcot 24. Er hat 1416 in Shropshire, England Matilda Cornwall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1470 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Walcott è nato il circa 1394 nel Lydbury North, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, John Walcot, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John Walcot, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Cornwall nel 1416, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1470, nel Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Walcottが約1394年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアリドブリー ノースで生まれた時，父John Walcotは27歳，母Mrs. John Walcotは24歳であった。1416年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでMatilda Cornwallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアリー ブロックハルストで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Walcott(이)가 대략 1394년 영국 슈럽실르 리드버이 노르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Walcot(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Walcot(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1416년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Matilda Cornwall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 영국 슈럽실르 리 브록후르스트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Walcott nasceu aproximadamente 1394, em Lydbury North, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Walcot, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Walcot, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Cornwall em 1416, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1470, em Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Walcott родился около 1394 г. в местности лидбури норт, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Walcot было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Walcot, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Cornwall в 1416 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1470 г. в местности ли броккхурст, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Walcott nació aproximadamente 1394, en Lydbury North, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Walcot, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Walcot, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Matilda Cornwall en 1416, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1470, en Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
